title: MODERNIZATION OF DELHI POLICE
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

MODERNIZATION OF DELHI POLICE

Posted On:
01 APR 2026 2:38PM by PIB Delhi

Delhi Police has taken various measures to provide digital services to citizens.  Some of the important measures are at Annexure.

Modernization of Police forces is a continuous and ongoing process. The Government of India provides central assistance to States and Union Territories (UTs), for modernizing the police forces under the Scheme of ‘Assistance to States and UTs for Modernization of Police’. Under this Scheme, the States  and UTs are provided central assistance for acquisition

of advanced weaponry, all types of intelligence equipment including Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), Night Vision Devices (NVDs), CCTV surveillance systems and body worn camera systems; modern communication equipment and state-of-the-art equipment for security, training, forensic, cybercrime, traffic policing etc. In addition, Delhi Police also incurs expenditure on acquisition of physical and technical infrastructure for modernization of the police force out of the regular budget grant provided by the Government of India.

Annexure

Important Citizen Centric Digital Services by Delhi Police

S. No.

Name of Service

S. No.

Name of Service

1

Arms License Online

9

Police Clearance Certificate (PCC)

Himmat Plus App

3

Theft e-FIR

4

12

5

Motor Vehicle Theft: e-FIR

13

Un-claimed/stolen Vehicle Search

6

Integrated Complaint Monitoring System (ICMS)

14

Pending Traffic Challan (e-Notice)

7

Traffic Challan e-Payment

15

Domestic Help Verification

8

Tenant Verification

16

Traffic Prahari App



This was stated by the Minister of State in the Ministry of Home Affairs Shri Nityanand Rai in a written reply to a question in the Rajya Sabha.

*****

RK/RR/PR/SK/SC

(Release ID: 2247664)

Visitor Counter : 98
